description.value:
Prerequisite: Str 13. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Ox tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Ox, you gain +2 bonus to Fortitude saves (resistance).
description.summary: Summon Ox tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Oxs; +2 bonus to Fortitude saves (resistance) within 50 ft of summon.
